title: Fair Shows Deceive.
content:
Smooth was the sea, and seem'd to call
    Two pretty girls to play withal:
    Who paddling there, the sea soon frown'd,
    And on a sudden both were drown'd.
    What credit can we give to seas,
    Who, kissing, kill such saints as these?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Fair Shows Deceive."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
